description_long: This trash bin is a large, cubic container with a sturdy metallic frame and honeycomb-patterned mesh panels on all sides, providing ventilation and visibility of the interior. The top surface is flat with a circular, grated opening, likely for depositing waste, and the brand name 'ORENZA' is prominently cut out on the upper front panel. The mesh panels are a warm orange-brown color, contrasting with the light gray metallic frame. On one side, there are two visible power cords, suggesting the bin may have an integrated compactor or sensor system. The front panel features a small, central lock or latch near the bottom, indicating a secure access door for maintenance or emptying. The overall design is robust and industrial, suitable for high-traffic urban environments.
description: A large, cubic trash bin with a gray metal frame, orange-brown mesh panels, a grated top opening, and visible power cords on one side. The brand 'ORENZA' is cut into the upper panel, and a lock or latch is present on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the honeycomb mesh, 'ORENZA' branding, and a clean, uninterrupted panel.
description_view_1: Front view with a small lock or latch at the bottom center, mesh panels, and 'ORENZA' branding.
description_view_2: Side view with visible power cords hanging down, mesh panels, and 'ORENZA' branding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with more power cords visible, mesh panels, and 'ORENZA' branding.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: Brand name 'ORENZA' cut into upper panel; no recycling symbols or waste type labels
